overview: A full-stack platform connecting NGOs with volunteers, featuring AI-powered skill and location-based task matching, role-based dashboards for volunteers, NGOs, and admins, proof upload for task verification, an interactive map, and real-time notifications.
features: Role-based authentication for Volunteers, NGO Admins, and Super Admins
AI-powered volunteer-task matching with visible Match Score %
Interactive Leaflet.js map with task pins and distance/skill filters
NGO task creation with AI-suggested volunteer assignments
Proof upload system for task completion verification
Volunteer dashboard with assigned, recommended, and completed tasks
Admin panel for NGO approvals, user management, and platform analytics
Dark/light mode with responsive mobile-first design
Sample data pre-loaded for all roles
